scripts.start:all: concurrently "npm run dev:api-python" "npm run dev:api-node" "npm run dev:api-alt" "npm run dev:service-generic" "npm run dev:gateway" "npm run dev:next" "npm run dev:vite"
scripts.test: npm run test:node && npm run test:python
scripts.test:node: cd apps/api-node && npm test && cd ../gateway && npm test
scripts.test:python: cd apps/api-python && python3 test_main.py && cd ../api-alt && python3 test_main.py && cd ../service-generic && python3 test_server.py
